mapper.select: SELECT br.*, u.username, b.title as book_title, b.isbn as book_isbn FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.id = #{id}

SELECT br.*, u.username, b.title as book_title, b.isbn as book_isbn FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} AND br.book_id = #{bookId} AND br.status = 0

SELECT br.*, u.username, b.title as book_title, b.isbn as book_isbn FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY br.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_records (user_id, book_id, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, remark, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{returnDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE status = 0 AND due_date < NOW()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE DATE(borrow_date) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE DATE(return_date) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 0
